step_rationale: Cytotoxic protease in inflammatory plaque; links immune activation to plaque destabilization.
mechanism: Serine protease from activated lymphocytes contributing to plaque inflammation and fibrous-cap degradation.

references.title: Exploring the pathways linking fasting insulin to coronary artery disease: a proteome-wide Mendelian randomization study.
Identification of potential therapeutic targets for plaque vulnerability based on an integrated analysis.
references.journal: Nutrition, metabolism, and cardiovascular diseases : NMCD
